mapper.sql: participant_id, user_id, participant_type, name, gender, birthday, age, guardian_name, guardian_mobile, school, organization, class_name, id_card_type, id_card_no, created_by_channel_id, claim_status, claimed_user_id, claimed_time, visible_scope, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark

p.participant_id as participantId, p.name as name, p.guardian_mobile as guardianMobile, p.guardian_mobile as guardianMobileMasked, p.school as school, p.class_name as className, case when p.claim_status = 'unclaimed' then 'unclaimed' when p.claim_status = 'pending_manual' then 'conflict' else 'claimed' end as claimStatus, coalesce(nullif(u.real_name, ''), u.nickname) as claimedUserName, p.create_time as createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_participant WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM jst_participant WHERE guardian_mobile = #{guardianMobile} AND claim_status = 'unclaimed' AND del_flag = '0'

select from jst_participant p left join jst_user u on u.user_id = p.claimed_user_id and u.del_flag = '0' where p.participant_id = #{participantId} and p.create_by = #{createBy} and p.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select p.participant_id, p.name, p.age, p.school, p.claim_status, p.claimed_user_id, coalesce(nullif(u.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nickname, ''), u.mobile) as user_name, p.guardian_mobile, p.created_by_channel_id, c.channel_name as created_by_channel_name, p.claimed_time, p.create_time from jst_participant p left join jst_user u on u.user_id = p.claimed_user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join jst_channel c on c.channel_id = p.created_by_channel_id and c.del_flag = '0' where p.del_flag = '0'
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.guardian_mobile like concat('%', #{guardianMobile}, '%')
and p.claim_status = #{claimStatus}
order by p.create_time desc, p.participant_id desc

select p.participant_id, p.name, p.gender, p.age, p.guardian_name, p.guardian_mobile, p.school, p.organization, p.class_name, p.claim_status, p.claimed_user_id, coalesce(nullif(u.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nickname, ''), u.mobile) as user_name, p.claimed_time, p.created_by_channel_id, c.channel_name as created_by_channel_name, p.create_time from jst_participant p left join jst_user u on u.user_id = p.claimed_user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join jst_channel c on c.channel_id = p.created_by_channel_id and c.del_flag = '0' where p.participant_id = #{participantId} and p.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_participant SET claim_status = #{newStatus}, claimed_user_id = #{claimedUserId}, claimed_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} AND claim_status = #{expectedStatus} AND del_flag = '0'

update jst_participant set name = #{name}, guardian_mobile = #{guardianMobile}, school = #{school}, class_name = #{className}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where participant_id = #{participantId} and create_by = #{createBy} and claim_status = 'unclaimed' and del_flag = '0'

update jst_participant set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where participant_id = #{participantId} and create_by = #{createBy} and claim_status = 'unclaimed' and del_flag = '0'
